calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Judgment Entered

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Continued To Jun-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 306

CONTINUANCE CALENDAR FOR UD COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Continued To Jun-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: 10;52 am.
Appearances:
Michael Karah Plaintiff is present in Pro Per.
Herbert Bryant, Esq. is present for Defendant.
Izuddin Ahmed, Defendant is present.
Court Reporter: Dawn Stark, CSR#7847, 415-601-5387.

Defendant reports that parties have stipulated to enter a judgment for the Defendant and that Plaintiff wll not pay any attorney's fees. Plaintiff reports that his case has no merit and therefore is agreeing to the terms of the agreement. The Court informs parties that he is concerned that the PLaintiff is representing himself. The Court does not accept the terms and conditions of the agreement as fully reported in the Reporter's notes. Tha parties are released on a 2 hour phone standby for trial assignment. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Dawn Stark, CSR#7847, 415-601-5387, Reported. (D501)
